prompt: Compare the field condition against the referenced document, tag, drawing, or standard.
scenario: In a T1 work setting, the evaluated element is S-302 Crane operations within 2.4 Structural & Ironwork. The relevant subcategory is 2.4.3 Rigging & Machinery Moving. The observed field condition is: load + rigging vs. load chart at radius (DOC+ME). The work is being assessed at the tested/inspected lifecycle state with source anchors OSHA 1926.1400, load charts. A drawing, inspection checklist, equipment tag, or manufacturer instruction is available for comparison.
title: T1 S-302 Document interpretation
